metadata.siteDescription: Art Ceramic — handcrafted ceramics, custom tiles, and studio services.
metadata.homeDescription: Art Ceramic — handcrafted ceramics, custom tiles, and studio services. Visit our gallery and blog.
metadata.galleryDescription: A curated gallery of ceramic work from Art Ceramic studio.
metadata.blogDescription: News, techniques, and updates from Art Ceramic.

company.name: Art Ceramic
company.tagline: Handcrafted ceramics for home and space
company.about: Art Ceramic is a studio dedicated to thoughtful design and traditional craftsmanship. From custom tiles to one-of-a-kind tableware, we shape clay with care for lasting beauty in everyday life.

home.servicesSubtitle: What we offer at the studio and for your projects.

services.tilesDesc: Bespoke glazes and patterns for kitchens, bathrooms, and feature walls.
services.potteryDesc: Tableware, vases, and decorative pieces thrown and finished by hand.
services.glazingDesc: Professional glazing, firing, and surface treatments for your project.
services.restorationDesc: Careful repair of chipped, cracked, or worn ceramic and tile work.
services.consultationDesc: Material selection, color palettes, and layout guidance for your space.
services.workshopsDesc: Introductory and advanced classes in wheel throwing and hand-building.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Selected pieces from the Art Ceramic studio.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Stories and updates from the studio.
